_comment: FIXTURE - one domain-specific encounter pack. Shadow Keep (domainId 4) maps to Office 3 (Death/Peter) via domainToOffice. Bundles the Faces that can appear here plus location-flavored lines for the shared beats. In-voice, HUD-short, no emojis or em dashes. Lines key to banterPoolId so the engine/screen can pull them.

lines.text: Shadow Keep. Peter keeps the third Office. He counts what stops moving.
Shadow Keep again. The Keep is starting to recognize your step.
Shadow Keep opens for you like it has done this a hundred times. Maybe it has.
Three Faces land in the dark. The Keep decides which one looks back.
The Faces fall the way the Keep prefers. Watch the skull one.
The Faces land already half-legend. The Keep tells the story before you read it.
Keep a Face or answer cold. Peter is in no hurry.
The Keep has logged your last visit. Choose anyway.
Peter already knows the line. Make the Keep revise its records.
Something lunges from the dark. Pressure before the math.
The Keep jumps you the way the rumor swore it would.
The dark jumps, and the Myth dates the bruise before it lands.
The Keep watches. No hit, but it is taking names.
The Keep watches and files you under regulars.
Even the Keep's patience has become a story now.
A gap opens in the dark. Take the window.
The Keep opens wider than it should for someone it half-trusts.
The Keep opens the way, and the Myth owes you the favor.
Room cleared. The Keep marks you survived the third Office.
Cleared. Peter's ledger gains a line in your column.
Cleared. The Keep will tell this one bigger than it was. Let it.
The Keep takes you. Death is a change in custody, not an end.
You fall in the dark. Peter had the paperwork ready.
You fall into the story the Keep keeps about you. Custody, as filed.
You back out of the Keep. The door stays unlocked.
You flee. The Keep marks the page and waits.
You flee, and the Keep keeps your seat in the dark.
